summary: Iteration 33: Tested 6 fixes for iToke platform. All backend tests pass (11/11). Frontend UI verified via Playwright. All features working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/v/{est_id}/scan with backup_code uppercase (ITK-WCU) - works correctly
Backend: POST /api/v/{est_id}/scan with code_hash lowercase (c19205af71207b2b) - works correctly
Backend: POST /api/v/{est_id}/scan with lowercase backup_code (itk-wcu) - converts to uppercase for search
Backend: DELETE /api/establishments/me/validators/{id} requires auth - returns 401
Backend: DELETE /api/establishments/me/validators/{id} returns 404 for non-existent validator
Backend: DELETE /api/establishments/me/validators/{id} successfully deletes validator
Backend: GET /api/v/{est_id}/info returns establishment info (public endpoint)
Backend: GET /api/establishments/me/validators returns list of validators
Backend: PUT /api/establishments/me/validators/{id}/toggle blocks/unblocks validator
Backend: POST /api/auth/email-login for establishment works correctly
Backend: GET /api/health returns healthy status
Frontend: Dashboard shows 'Ações Rápidas' section
Frontend: Dashboard shows 'Equipe / Validadores' button with icon, title, subtitle, chevron (same style as 'Meu Perfil')
Frontend: Clicking 'Equipe / Validadores' navigates to /establishment/team
Frontend: Team page header shows 'Equipe / Validadores'
Frontend: Team page shows green 'Convidar via WhatsApp' button
Frontend: Team page shows 'Copiar Link de Acesso' button
Frontend: Team page shows 'COLABORADORES (15)' section with list of validators
Frontend: Each validator card has 'Reenviar', 'Bloquear', 'Excluir' buttons
Frontend: Validator page (/v/{est_id}) shows title 'Validador de QR Code'
Frontend: Validator page shows establishment name as subtitle (e.g., 'OFICINA DA FOME 2')
Code Review: Pending button text is 'Pagar o restante no caixa (Pendente)' at line 357 of /app/frontend/app/v/[id].tsx
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed validators during testing (auto-cleaned)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 33 complete. All 6 fixes verified: 1) 'Equipe / Validadores' button in 'Ações Rápidas' with same style as 'Meu Perfil', 2) Team page has WhatsApp and Copy Link buttons, 3) Validator cards have Reenviar/Bloquear/Excluir buttons, 4) Validator page title is 'Validador de QR Code', 5) Pending button text is 'Pagar o restante no caixa (Pendente)', 6) Scanner bug fixed - code_hash uses original case, backup_code uses uppercase for search.

features_verified.validator_page_subtitle: WORKING - Shows establishment name as subtitle
